title: ReformLab Scenario Template
description: Schema for defining environmental policy scenarios (baseline + reform overrides) in ReformLab

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema file for IDE validation support

version.description: Schema version for migration and compatibility tracking (e.g., '1.0')

name.description: Human-readable name for the scenario template

description.description: Detailed description of the scenario's purpose and configuration

policy_type.description: Type of environmental policy being modeled

baseline_ref.description: Reference to the baseline scenario this reform extends. If present, this is a reform scenario that inherits unspecified parameters from the baseline.

year_schedule.description: Time period for the policy parameters. Required for baseline scenarios, optional for reforms (inherited from baseline).

start_year.description: First year of the policy schedule

end_year.description: Last year of the policy schedule (inclusive)

parameters.description: Policy-specific parameters that vary by policy_type

rate_schedule.description: Year-indexed rates (e.g., EUR per tonne CO2 for carbon tax)

exemptions.description: List of exemption rules by category

thresholds.description: Threshold-based rules (e.g., income thresholds for eligibility)

covered_categories.description: List of energy/emission categories covered by this policy

income_caps.description: Year-indexed income caps for means testing (subsidy policy_type)

income_weights.description: Decile-indexed weights for progressive distribution (rebate policy_type)

pivot_point.description: Emission threshold separating fee from rebate (feebate policy_type)

fee_rate.description: Rate applied to emissions above pivot (feebate policy_type)

rebate_rate.description: Rate applied to emissions below pivot (feebate policy_type)

year_schedule.description: Required for baseline scenarios: defines the policy time period
